title: Trace: indexing pipeline
task: I need to understand the full indexing pipeline from when a user runs `claudemem index` to when chunks are stored. Trace the execution path and list the key functions in order. Do NOT make any code changes.
output:
I now have enough to give a complete, accurate trace. Here's the full indexing pipeline:

---

## `claudemem index` Execution Path

### 1. Entry — `src/cli.ts`

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 1 | `runCli(args)` | `cli.ts:185` — parses `--agent`, `--force`, `--no-llm`, etc. |
| 2 | `handleIndex(args)` | `cli.ts:682` — routes `case "index"` at `cli.ts:270` |

`handleIndex` lazy-imports `createIndexer`, instantiates it, then calls:

```
indexer.index(force)  ← cli.ts:782
```

---

### 2. Lock Acquisition — `src/core/indexer.ts`

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 3 | `Indexer.index(force)` | `indexer.ts:303` |
| 4 | `createIndexLock(projectPath).acquire(...)` | `indexer.ts:310–314` — prevents concurrent runs |
| 5 | `this.indexInternal(force, startTime)` | `indexer.ts:325` |

---

### 3. Initialization — `indexInternal` → `initialize()`

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 6 | `Indexer.initialize()` | `indexer.ts:229` |
| 6a | `parserManager.initialize()` | `indexer.ts:235` — loads tree-sitter WASM grammars |
| 6b | `createCodeUnitExtractor()` | `indexer.ts:238` — AST symbol extractor |
| 6c | `createFileTracker(indexDbPath, ...)` | `indexer.ts:242` — SQLite-backed change tracker |
| 6d | `createEmbeddingsClient({ model })` | `indexer.ts:261` — embedding API client |
| 6e | `createVectorStore(path).initialize()` | `indexer.ts:266–267` — LanceDB vector store |
| 6f | `createEnricher(llmClient, embeddingsClient, ...)` | `indexer.ts:273` — LLM enrichment pipeline |

---

### 4. File Discovery & Change Detection

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 7 | `this.discoverFiles()` | `indexer.ts:365` — walks project dir, applies exclude/include patterns |
| 8 | `fileTracker.getChanges(allFiles)` | `indexer.ts:382` — detects new, modified, deleted |
| 8a | `vectorStore.deleteByFile(deletedFile)` | `indexer.ts:399` — remove stale chunks |
| 8b | `vectorStore.getChunksWithVectors(modifiedFile)` | `indexer.ts:409` — cache old vectors for reuse |

---

### 5. Per-Batch Processing (batches of 500 files)

**Phase 1 — Parse & Chunk** (`indexer.ts:462–506`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 9 | `chunkFileByPath(content, filePath, fileHash)` | `chunker.ts:712` |
| 9a | `parserManager.getLanguage(filePath)` | `chunker.ts:718` |
| 9b | `parserManager.parse(source, language)` | `chunker.ts:62` — builds tree-sitter AST |
| 9c | `extractChunksAST(tree, source, language)` | `chunker.ts:69` — walks AST via `processChildren()` |
| 9d | `createCodeChunk(parsed, filePath, ...)` | `chunker.ts:76` — assigns IDs, hashes, metadata |

**Phase 2 — Embed Chunks** (`indexer.ts:524–641`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 10 | Check `oldChunksCache` by `contentHash` | `indexer.ts:542–564` — reuses vectors for unchanged content |
| 11 | `embeddingsClient.embed(texts, progressCb)` | `indexer.ts:597` — calls embedding API for new chunks only |

**Phase 2b — Extract & Embed Code Units** (`indexer.ts:682–800`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 12 | `codeUnitExtractor.extractUnits(content, filePath, language, fileHash)` | `indexer.ts:703` — fine-grained AST symbol extraction |
| 13 | `embeddingsClient.embed(unitTexts)` | `indexer.ts:746` — embed each code unit |
| 14 | `vectorStore.addCodeUnits(unitsWithEmbeddings)` | `indexer.ts:782` — store in LanceDB |

**Phase 3 — Store Chunks** (`indexer.ts:651–668`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 15 | `vectorStore.addChunks(chunksWithEmbeddings)` | `indexer.ts:668` — persist chunks + vectors to LanceDB |

**Phase 4 — Update File Tracker** (`indexer.ts:803–820`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 16 | `fileTracker.markIndexed(filePath, fileHash, chunkIds)` | `indexer.ts:816` — records file→chunkIDs in SQLite |

---

### 6. Post-Batch: Symbol Graph & Enrichment

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 17 | `this.extractSymbolGraph(filesToIndex, force)` | `indexer.ts:929` |
| 17a | `symbolExtractor.extractSymbols(content, path, language)` | `indexer.ts:1203` |
| 17b | `symbolExtractor.extractReferences(content, ...)` | `indexer.ts:1213` |
| 17c | `fileTracker.insertSymbols/insertReferences(...)` | `indexer.ts:1210/1221` |
| 18 | `enricher.enrichFiles(fileChunksForEnrichment, { concurrency })` | `indexer.ts:903` — LLM generates file/symbol summaries, stored as enrichment docs |

Steps 17 and 18 run **in parallel** when embedding is local and LLM is cloud (`indexer.ts:933–936`), otherwise sequentially.

---

### 7. Finalization

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 19 | `this.fetchExternalDocs()` | `indexer.ts:952` — fetch library docs if manifest changed |
| 20 | `fileTracker.setMetadata("embeddingModel", ...)` | `indexer.ts:965` — persist model name for future search |
| 21 | `indexLock.release()` | `indexer.ts:328` — always released in `finally` |

Returns `EnrichedIndexResult` with counts and cost back up to `handleIndex`.
